mapper.select: select id, user_id, type, target_id, name, avatar, last_message, last_message_time, unread_count, create_time, update_time from message_conversation where user_id = #{userId} order by last_message_time desc
select * from message_conversation where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update message_conversation set last_message = #{lastMessage}, last_message_time = #{lastMessageTime}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update message_conversation set unread_count = unread_count + 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update message_conversation set unread_count = 0, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select sum(unread_count) from message_conversation where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from message_conversation where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
